attributes.description: Real-time view of active database sessions. What is running right now? What are sessions waiting on?

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| KEEP oracledb.sql_id, db.query.text, oracledb.duration_sec, oracledb.wait_class, oracledb.schemaname, oracledb.program
| SORT oracledb.duration_sec DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| KEEP oracledb.sql_id, db.query.text, oracledb.duration_sec, oracledb.wait_class, oracledb.schemaname, oracledb.program
| SORT oracledb.duration_sec DESC
| LIMIT 20

embeddableConfig.description: Top 20 active queries ranked by execution duration, showing SQL ID, SQL text, wait class, schema, program, and duration in seconds.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.schemaname IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY schemaname = oracledb.schemaname
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.schemaname IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY schemaname = oracledb.schemaname
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Count of active session samples grouped by Oracle schema (oracledb.schemaname). Shows which schemas are running the most queries.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.program IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY program = oracledb.program
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.program IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY program = oracledb.program
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Count of active session samples grouped by client program (oracledb.program). Shows which client applications are generating load.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.event IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*), avg_duration = AVG(oracledb.duration_sec) BY wait_event = oracledb.event, wait_class = oracledb.wait_class
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.event IS NOT NULL
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*), avg_duration = AVG(oracledb.duration_sec) BY wait_event = oracledb.event, wait_class = oracledb.wait_class
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 20

embeddableConfig.description: Wait events with their parent wait class, occurrence count, and average duration in seconds. Sorted by event count descending.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND client.address IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY client_addr = client.address
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND client.address IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY client_addr = client.address
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Count of active session samples grouped by client host address (client.address). Shows which client hosts are generating the most queries.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Number of db.server.query_sample events collected per time bucket. Shows the volume of active session samples over time.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| KEEP db.query.text, oracledb.sid, oracledb.serial, oracledb.schemaname, user.name, oracledb.wait_class, oracledb.event, oracledb.duration_sec
| SORT oracledb.duration_sec DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| KEEP db.query.text, oracledb.sid, oracledb.serial, oracledb.schemaname, user.name, oracledb.wait_class, oracledb.event, oracledb.duration_sec
| SORT oracledb.duration_sec DESC
| LIMIT 20

embeddableConfig.description: Top 20 longest-running queries showing SQL text, SID, serial number, schema, user, wait class, wait event, and duration in seconds.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Count of db.server.query_sample events in the selected time range, representing the number of active session samples captured.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| STATS count = COUNT(*)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.duration_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_duration = MAX(oracledb.duration_sec)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.duration_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_duration = MAX(oracledb.duration_sec)

embeddableConfig.description: Longest query execution duration in seconds (MAX of oracledb.duration_sec) observed in active session samples.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.duration_sec IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_duration = MAX(oracledb.duration_sec)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.sql_id IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_sql = COUNT_DISTINCT(oracledb.sql_id)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.sql_id IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_sql = COUNT_DISTINCT(oracledb.sql_id)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of unique SQL IDs (oracledb.sql_id) observed in active session samples during the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.sql_id IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_sql = COUNT_DISTINCT(oracledb.sql_id)

embeddableConfig.content:
# Oracle Database - Active Query Analysis

This dashboard offers an ASH-equivalent view of active database sessions, including

- Active session count, distinct SQL IDs in flight, and maximum query duration
- Wait class distribution as a pie chart and stacked area trend over time
- Top queries ranked by execution duration with SQL text, schema, and program details
- Session breakdown by schema, program, and client address to identify load sources
- Detailed wait event analysis showing event frequency and average duration per wait class
- Query sample volume over time to monitor collection health
- Longest-running queries with SID, serial, user, and wait event context for targeted investigation

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.wait_class IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY wait_class = oracledb.wait_class
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.wait_class IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY wait_class = oracledb.wait_class
| SORT count DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Distribution of sampled active sessions by Oracle wait class (CPU, User I/O, Concurrency, Application, etc.). Each slice represents the count of samples in that wait class.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.wait_class IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), wait_class = oracledb.wait_class
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample" AND oracledb.wait_class IS NOT NULL
| STATS count = COUNT(*) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), wait_class = oracledb.wait_class
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Stacked area showing the count of active session samples per wait class over time.

attributes.title: [Logs Oracle] Active Query Analysis
